free_text: The 4He(12C,g)160 reaction at stellar energies.
The 4 MV dynamitron accelerator
A gas target system was used. In the determination of
absolute cross sections, natural hydrogen gas was
filled into the gas target system.
The gamma-ray transitions were detected at
Ang=90 degree with two 10.2cm diam. * 10.2cm NaI(T1)
crystals placed at a distance of 2.0 cm from the beam
axis
Error in energy loss data
Error in calculated Coulomb cross section
Error in elastic scattering yields
Error in corrections for relative gamma-ray
efficiencies
